title: Migrate every remaining baseline-reachable Node launcher
action: Implement the exhaustive transitive-launch census. Migrate every baseline-reachable nested Node entrypoint in test_lib.mjs and test_openai_metadata.mjs to the shared Worker runner with mechanical async propagation and preserved argv/env/cwd/stdin/stdout/stderr/status assertions. Replace race_claims_child self-forks and the generated handoff-race self-forks with genuinely concurrent Worker racers that preserve barriers, interleaving, exit meanings, and falsifiability; do not serialize races through the shared runner. Keep all reachable Git calls external. In test_lib Git setup and reviews.mjs, judge concrete status/output before attached sandbox error metadata, while still failing null/nonzero/missing output. Keep template reviews.mjs and .bee/bin/lib/reviews.mjs byte-identical. Preserve every existing assertion and run the exact unchanged full repository baseline.

truths: All 22 census-confirmed nested Node launches execute without child_process under the configured baseline.
Race claim and handoff tests still run concurrent racers behind their existing barriers and detect invariant violations.
Metadata negative fixtures retain validation stderr and exact nonzero behavior.
All five reachable Git integrations remain real and fail on null/nonzero/missing output, but valid status/output is not rejected solely for attached EPERM metadata.
The exact configured repository verify exits zero.

artifacts.substantive: async Worker transport for all reachable Node entrypoints and generated race orchestrator

key_links: all ordinary Node module launches call scripts/lib/run-module-worker.mjs
race paths use concurrent Worker primitives rather than the serialized runner
reviews template and runtime mirror remain byte-identical
prohibitions: No assertion removal or EPERM skip
No serialized replacement for concurrency tests
No production behavior change beyond the mirrored Git result check
